creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
As suggest by: Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org> I am submitting this
shar text as a follow up to ports/133248. This is referencing
ports/133836.

Please note: the '$FILESDIR/scamp.conf.sample' listed in the original
version has been removed in the new version and replaced by the
'$FILESDIR/default.sample' file.

The new 'shar' file is attached.

-- 
Gerard Seibert
gerard@seibercom.net

QOTD:	"I used to be lost in the shuffle, now I just shuffle
	along with the lost."
